response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq that directly matches the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang, C++), MongoDB experience, Docker/Kubernetes exposure via GISCollective, and a track record of TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship from RIDE Capital. Main gaps are Nest.js and React depth not explicitly evidenced, but the breadth and seniority strongly support an interview.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq aligns with the role's AI agent requirement
13+ years polyglot full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
React exposure is listed but appears limited compared to Ember.js depth across multiple roles
Vitest specifically not mentioned, though general testing framework expertise is strong

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Missing explicit Nest.js and limited React depth
